wikitext:
{{Card Infobox|Enthralled||2|}}{{Keyword Infobox|Eternal|2}}
{{C|Enthralled||2}} is a 2 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{KW|Eternal||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} Card. If it is in your Hand, it must be played before other cards.

== Obtaining Enthralled ==
{{C|Enthralled||2}} can only be obtained by taking {{R|Blood-Soaked Rose||2}} from {{KW|Vakuu||2}}'s offering at the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, which provides 1 {{Icon|CE|2}} at the start of each turn.

== Interactions ==

=== Synergies ===
* {{C|Enthralled||2}}'s effect can be bypassed in many ways:
** Cards like {{C|Acrobatics||2}} can draw and then Discard it in one action.
** Cards like {{C|Havoc||2}}, {{C|CHARGE!!||2}} and {{C|Cleanse||2}} can {{KW|Exhaust||2}} or {{KW|Transform||2}} it before drawing it.
** {{R|Pael's Eye||2}} can {{KW|Exhaust||2}} it without needing to play a card, before giving you an extra turn.
** While {{C|Enthralled||2}} is in your Hand, other cards can still be played indirectly through means such as {{C|Decisions, Decisions||2}}, {{C|Stampede||2}}, and {{P|Distilled Chaos||2}}.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Enthralled to the game.
